---
title: "Git Practice with Quarto"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
---

# Git Practice Playground

This file is for practicing Git commands with small visible changes.

## 1. Hello world

```{r}
print("Hello, world!")
print("TEST CONFLICT")
<<<<<<< HEAD
#OREGON STATE

=======

1 + 1 
2 + 2 
>>>>>>> f03aee0752e264591965c88543a6b84bc985d647
```

```{r}
print("Git is tracking this file.")
print("Quarto + R = reproducible workflow.")
```

```{r}
x <- 50000000000000000000000000000000
y <- 7
print(paste("x + y =", x + y))
```

```{r}
cat("
  /\\_/\\
 ( o.o )
  > ^ <
")
```


```{r}
#install.packages("praise")
#install.packages("cowsay")
#install.packages("beepr")
library(praise)
library(cowsay)
library(beepr)
say("All done making some beautiful tables! :) ", "whale"); beep(3)  ```
